name: Hierarchy — Taxonomy Classification Tree
input: Create a hierarchy showing biological taxonomy: Life → Domain (Bacteria, Archaea, Eukarya) → Kingdom (under Eukarya: Animalia, Plantae, Fungi, Protista) → Phylum (under Animalia: Chordata, Arthropoda).
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Deep hierarchy tree with multiple levels of branching.

data.title: Biological Taxonomy Classification

items.label: Fungi
items.description: Kingdom: heterotrophic decomposers with chitin cell walls

items.label: Chordata
items.description: Phylum: animals with notochord, including vertebrates

items.label: Arthropoda
items.description: Phylum: invertebrates with exoskeleton and jointed legs

data.caption: Hierarchical taxonomy from Life through domains, kingdoms, and phyla
